details.title: Greenhouse gas emissions
details.description: Greenhouse gas emissions include carbon dioxide, methane and nitrous oxide from all sources, including land-use change. They are measured in tonnes of carbon dioxide-equivalents over a 100-year timescale.

details.title: Per capita greenhouse gas emissions
details.description: Greenhouse gas emissions are measured in tonnes per person of carbon dioxide-equivalents over a 100-year timescale. Greenhouse gas emissions include carbon dioxide, methane and nitrous oxide from all sources, including land-use change.
details.unit: Tonnes of CO₂ equivalents per person

details.title: CO₂ emissions
details.description:
Carbon dioxide (CO₂) emissions from fossil fuels and industry. Land-use change is not included.
This data is based on territorial emissions, which do not account for emissions embedded in traded goods. Emissions from international aviation and shipping are not included in any country or region's emissions.

details.title: Per capita CO₂ emissions
details.description:
• Carbon dioxide (CO₂) emissions from fossil fuels and industry. Land-use change is not included.
  • Per capita emissions represent the emissions of an average person in a country or region - they are calculated as the total emissions divided by population.
  • This data is based on territorial emissions, which do not account for emissions embedded in traded goods.
  • Emissions from international aviation and shipping are not included in any country or region's emissions. They are only included in the global total emissions.

details.title: Cumulative CO₂ emissions
details.description: Running sum of CO₂ emissions produced from fossil fuels and industry since the first year of recording, measured in tonnes. Land-use change is not included.

details.title: Sea level rise
details.description:
• Global mean sea level rise is measured relative to the 1993 - 2008 average sea level.
  • This is shown as the average of two time series: the widely-cited Church & White dataset; the University of Hawaii Sea Level Center (UHLSC).

select_columns.data: Global average temperature anomaly relative to 1861-1890

details.title: Global warming: annual temperature anomaly
details.description: The difference in average land-sea surface temperature compared to the 1861-1890 mean, in degrees Celsius.

details.title: Annual average surface temperature
details.description: The temperature of the air measured 2 meters above the ground, encompassing land, sea, and in-land water surfaces. The 2024 data is incomplete and was last updated 07 April 2025.

details.title: Gross domestic product (GDP)
details.description:
• Gross domestic product (GDP) is a measure of the total value added from the production of goods and services in a country or region each year.
  • This GDP indicator provides information on economic growth and income levels from 1960.
  • This data is adjusted by inflation but does not account for differences in living costs between countries.
  • This data is expressed in constant 2015 US$.

details.title: Population (Total)
details.description: Historic estimates from 1950 to 2023. De facto total population in a country, area or region as of 1 July of the year indicated.

details.title: Population by age group (Under-25s)
details.description: Historic estimates from 1950 to 2023. De facto total population in a country, area or region as of 1 July of the year indicated. This only includes individuals aged 0-24.

details.title: Population by age group (Ages 25-64)
details.description: Historic estimates from 1950 to 2023. De facto total population in a country, area or region as of 1 July of the year indicated. This only includes individuals aged 25-64.

details.title: Population by age group (Ages 65+)
details.description: Historic estimates from 1950 to 2023. De facto total population in a country, area or region as of 1 July of the year indicated. This only includes individuals aged 65+.

details.title: Population by age group (0-4 years)
details.description: De facto total population in a country, area or region as of 1 July of the year indicated. This only includes individuals aged 0-4.

details.title: Population by age group (5-9 years)
details.description: De facto total population in a country, area or region as of 1 July of the year indicated. This only includes individuals aged 5-9.

details.title: Population by age group (10-14 years)
details.description: De facto total population in a country, area or region as of 1 July of the year indicated. This only includes individuals aged 10-14.

details.title: Population by age group (15-19 years)
details.description: De facto total population in a country, area or region as of 1 July of the year indicated. This only includes individuals aged 15-19.

details.title: Population by age group (20-24 years)
details.description: De facto total population in a country, area or region as of 1 July of the year indicated. This only includes individuals aged 20-24.

details.title: Population by age group (25-29 years)
details.description: De facto total population in a country, area or region as of 1 July of the year indicated. This only includes individuals aged 25-29.

details.title: Population by age group (30-34 years)
details.description: De facto total population in a country, area or region as of 1 July of the year indicated. This only includes individuals aged 30-34.

details.title: Population by age group (35-39 years)
details.description: De facto total population in a country, area or region as of 1 July of the year indicated. This only includes individuals aged 35-39.

details.title: Population by age group (40-44 years)
details.description: De facto total population in a country, area or region as of 1 July of the year indicated. This only includes individuals aged 40-44.

details.title: Population by age group (45-49 years)
details.description: De facto total population in a country, area or region as of 1 July of the year indicated. This only includes individuals aged 45-49.

details.title: Annual population growth
details.description: Population yearly increment, estimated as the difference between the population on 1st of July of the year indicated and the population a year before.

details.title: Share of the population that is female
details.description: Female population is the percentage of the population that is female. Population is based on the de facto definition of population, which counts all residents regardless of legal status or citizenship.

details.title: Female population
details.description: De facto total population in a country, area or region as of 1 July of the year indicated.

details.title: Number of people living in urban areas
details.description:
Urban population refers to people living in urban areas as defined by national statistical offices. It is calculated using World Bank population estimates and urban ratios from the United Nations World Urbanization Prospects.

Limitations and exceptions: Aggregation of urban and rural population may not add up to total population because of different country coverage. There is no consistent and universally accepted standard for distinguishing urban from rural areas, in part because of the wide variety of situations across countries.

Because the estimates of city and metropolitan area are based on national definitions of what constitutes a city or metropolitan area, cross-country comparisons should be made with caution.

details.title: Number of people living in rural areas
details.description:
Rural population refers to people living in rural areas as defined by national statistical offices. It is calculated as the difference between total population and urban population.

Limitations and exceptions: Aggregation of urban and rural population may not add up to total population because of different country coverage. There is no consistent and universally accepted standard for distinguishing urban from rural areas, in part because of the wide variety of situations across countries.

Because the estimates of city and metropolitan area are based on national definitions of what constitutes a city or metropolitan area, cross-country comparisons should be made with caution.

details.title: Population density
details.description: The number of people per km² of land area.

details.title: Birth rate
details.description: The total number of births per 1,000 people in a given year.

details.title: Total fertility rate: births per woman
details.description: The total fertility rate summarizes the total number of births a woman would have, if she experienced the birth rates seen in women of each age group in one particular year across her childbearing years.

details.title: Population growth rate without migration
details.description: Crude birth rate minus the crude death rate. Represents the portion of population growth (or decline) determined exclusively by births and deaths.

details.title: Population growth rate with migration
details.description: Average exponential rate of growth of the population over a given period. It is calculated as ln(P2/P1) where P1 and P2 are the populations on 1 January of subsequent years.

details.title: Total number of international immigrants
details.description: An immigrant is someone moving to a country that they were not born in.

details.title: Unemployment rate (Source: International Labour Organization)
details.description: Unemployment refers to the share of the labor force that is without work but available for and seeking employment.

details.title: Unemployment rate (Source: International Monetary Fund)
details.description: Unemployment refers to the share of the labor force that is without work but available for and seeking employment.

details.title: Life expectancy
details.description:
• Period life expectancy is a metric that summarizes death rates across all age groups in one particular year.
  • For a given year, it represents the remaining average lifespan for a hypothetical group of people, if they experienced the same age-specific death rates throughout the rest of their lives as the age-specific death rates seen in that particular year.

details.title: Medical doctors per 1,000 people
details.description: Physicians include generalist and specialist medical practitioners.

details.title: Share of men using tobacco
details.description: Estimated percentage of adults (15 years and older) who currently use tobacco. This includes all forms of tobacco use, such as smoking, chewing or snuffing, but excludes products that do not contain tobacco, such as e-cigarettes.

details.title: Share of women using tobacco
details.description: Estimated percentage of adults (15 years and older) who currently use tobacco. This includes all forms of tobacco use, such as smoking, chewing or snuffing, but excludes products that do not contain tobacco, such as e-cigarettes.

details.title: Reported share of people experiencing homelessness
details.description: The data can't be directly compared between countries because they use different definitions and methods. For example, some countries collect data from one night of the year, while others include everyone who lived on the street or stayed in a shelter at any time during the year.

details.title: Share of the urban population living in slums
details.description: Proportion of urban population living in slums (%). A slum household is defined as a group of individuals living under the same roof lacking one or more of the following conditions: access to improved water, access to improved sanitation, sufficient living area, durability of housing, and security of tenure.

details.title: Police officers per 1,000 people
details.description: Data on police personnel come from the United Nations Survey of Crime Trends and Operations of Criminal Justice Systems (UNODC) from various years. These are country-reported data covering the years 1973-2015 for a varying number of countries each year.

details.title: Press freedom
details.description:
This dataset provides information on press freedoms, using data from Freedom House's (2017) Freedom of the Press. It captures the legal, political, and economic environment of the press.

Legend:
  • 0: Not free
  • 1: Partly free
  • 2: Free

details.title: Press freedom index
details.description:
The index combines expert estimates with data on violence against journalists. It ranges from 0 (freedom) to 100 (no freedom).

The variable denotes a country's press freedom score. It combines data on violence against journalists with experts assessments by media professionals, lawyers, and sociologists on pluralism, media independence, media environment and self-censorship, legislative framework, transparency, and the quality of the infrastructure that supports the production of news and information.

details.title: Foreign aid received
details.description: Net official development assistance (ODA) from governments and multilateral organizations. This data is expressed in US dollars and adjusted for inflation.

details.title: Foreign aid given
details.description: Net official development assistance (ODA) from governments and multilateral organizations, grants from civil society organizations. This data is expressed in US dollars and adjusted for inflation.

details.title: Share of the population with access to electricity
details.description: Having access to electricity is defined in international statistics as having an electricity source that can provide very basic lighting, and charge a phone or power a radio for 4 hours per day.

details.title: Share of population with severe food insecurity
details.description: Someone suffering from severe food insecurity has an insufficient quantity of food. They will experience symptoms such as physical hunger.

details.title: Share of employment in agriculture
details.description: This data consists of reported observations for some countries and estimates modeled by the source for others, and includes employment in the informal economy.

details.title: Share of employment in industry
details.description: This data consists of reported observations for some countries and estimates modeled by the source for others, and includes employment in the informal economy.

details.title: Share of employment in services
details.description: This data consists of reported observations for some countries and estimates modeled by the source for others, and includes employment in the informal economy.

details.title: Refugee population by country or territory of asylum
details.description:
• Total number of cross-border refugees by the country they live in. This includes all refugees living in this country, not just the new refugees arriving this year.
  • A refugee is defined as a person in need of international protection, being outside their country of origin, because of serious threats against which the authorities of their home country cannot or will not protect them.

details.title: Agricultural land use
details.description: Land used for cultivation of crops and animal husbandry. The total of areas under cropland and permanent meadows and pastures.

details.title: Land use: Agriculture
details.description: Total agricultural area for each seperate country over time.

details.title: Area of permanent meadows and pastures
details.description: This is the land used for livestock grazing. The total land use for livestock farming is higher as it additionally requires cropland used to grow animal feed.

details.title: Wildfire area burned by land cover type (Other land)
details.description: Total area of land categories other than forests, savannas, shrublands/grasslands and croplands burnt by [wildfires](#dod:wildfires) in hectares.

details.title: Wildfire area burned by land cover type (Croplands)
details.description: Total area of agricultural lands burnt by [wildfires](#dod:wildfires) in hectares.

details.title: Wildfire area burned by land cover type (Forests)
details.description: Total area of forests burnt by [wildfires](#dod:wildfires) in hectares.

details.title: Wildfire area burned by land cover type (Savannas)
details.description: Total area of savannas burnt by [wildfires](#dod:wildfires) in hectares.

details.title: Wildfire area burned by land cover type (Shrublands and grasslands)
details.description: Total area of shrublands and grasslands burnt by [wildfires](#dod:wildfires) in hectares.

details.title: Cereal production
details.description: Cereals include wheat, rice, maize, barley, oats, rye, millet, sorghum, buckwheat, and mixed grains.

details.title: Cereal yields
details.description: Measured in tonnes per hectare.

details.title: Wheat yields
details.description: Yield is the amount produced per unit of land used, measured in tonnes per hectare.

details.title: Rice yields
details.description: Yield is the amount produced per unit of land used, measured in tonnes per hectare.

details.title: Banana yields
details.description: Yield is the amount produced per unit of land used, measured in tonnes per hectare.

details.title: Maize yields
details.description: Yield is the amount produced per unit of land used, measured in tonnes per hectare.

details.title: Soybean yields
details.description: Yield is the amount produced per unit of land used, measured in tonnes per hectare.

details.title: Potato yields
details.description: Yield is the amount produced per unit of land used, measured in tonnes per hectare.

details.title: Bean yields
details.description: Yield is the amount produced per unit of land used, measured in tonnes per hectare.

details.title: Cassava yields
details.description: Yield is the amount produced per unit of land used, measured in tonnes per hectare.

details.title: Barley yields
details.description: Yield is the amount produced per unit of land used, measured in tonnes per hectare.

details.title: Wheat yields
details.description: Yield is the amount produced per unit of land used, measured in tonnes per hectare.

details.title: Maize yields
details.description: Yield is the amount produced per unit of land used, measured in tonnes per hectare.

details.title: Rice yields
details.description: Yield is the amount produced per unit of land used, measured in tonnes per hectare.

details.title: Soybean yields
details.description: Yield is the amount produced per unit of land used, measured in tonnes per hectare.

details.title: Cereal yields
details.description: Measured in tonnes per hectare.

details.title: Land used for cereal production
details.description: Cereals include wheat, rice, maize, barley, oats, rye, millet, sorghum, buckwheat, and mixed grains.

details.title: Aquaculture production
details.description: Aquaculture is the farming of aquatic organisms including fish, molluscs, crustaceans and aquatic plants.

details.title: Capture fisheries
details.description: Capture fishery production is the volume of wild fish catches landed for all commercial, industrial, recreational and subsistence purposes.

details.title: Annual GDP growth
details.description: Annual percent change in gross domestic product. This data is adjusted for inflation.

details.title: Total health spending per person
details.description: The sum of public and private annual health expenditure per person. This data is adjusted for differences in living costs between countries, but it is not adjusted for inflation.

details.title: Health spending per person by source (Domestic government)
details.description: This data is adjusted for differences in living costs between countries, but it is not adjusted for inflation.

details.title: Health spending per person by source (Private)
details.description: This data is adjusted for differences in living costs between countries, but it is not adjusted for inflation.

details.title: Health spending per person by source (External aid)
details.description: This data is adjusted for differences in living costs between countries, but it is not adjusted for inflation.

details.title: Gross national income (GNI) per capita
details.description: Average income per person earned by residents of a country or region, including income earned abroad. This data is adjusted for inflation and differences in living costs between countries.

details.title: GDP per capita
details.description: Average economic output per person in a country or region per year. This data is adjusted by inflation but _does not_ account for differences in living costs between countries.

details.title: Median income or consumption per day
details.description: The median is the value of income or consumption below which 50% of the population live. This data is adjusted for inflation and for differences in living costs between countries.

details.title: Income inequality: Gini coefficient
details.description: The Gini coefficient measures inequality on a scale from 0 to 1. Higher values indicate higher inequality.

details.title: Income inequality: Atkinson index
details.description: The Atkinson index measures inequality on a scale from 0 to 1. Higher values indicate higher inequality. Depending on the country and year, the data relates to income measured after taxes and benefits, or to consumption, per capita.

details.title: Gross domestic product (GDP)
details.description: Total economic output of a country or region per year. This data is adjusted for inflation and differences in living costs between countries.

details.title: Agricultural value added per worker
details.description: Agricultural value added per worker is calculated by dividing the amount of economic value generated from farming, forestry and fishing by the number of people that work in these sectors. This data is expressed in US dollars. It is adjusted for inflation but does not account for differences in living costs between countries.

details.title: Wheat
details.description: Harvested production per unit of harvested area for wheat.

details.title: Rice
details.description: All yields are measured in tonnes per hectare.

details.title: Barley
details.description: All yields are measured in tonnes per hectare.

details.title: Maize
details.description: Average corn yields measured in tonnes per hectare.

details.title: Rye
details.description: All yields are measured in tonnes per hectare.

details.title: Oats
details.description: All yields are measured in tonnes per hectare.

details.title: Millet
details.description: All yields are measured in tonnes per hectare.

details.title: Sorghum
details.description: All yields are measured in tonnes per hectare.

details.title: Potatoes
details.description: All yields are measured in tonnes per hectare.

details.title: Total factor productivity level
details.description: Total factor productivity (TFP) is an estimate of how efficiently an economy turns its inputs into outputs. It is defined as the part of GDP not explained by capital or labor input. This data is adjusted for inflation and differences in living costs between countries. TFP is measured relative to each country's TFP in 2017.

details.title: Out-of-pocket expenditure per capita
details.description: Out-of-pocket spending is defined as direct payments made by individuals to health care providers at the time of service use. This data is adjusted for differences in living costs between countries, but it is not adjusted for inflation.

details.title: Current health expenditure per capita
details.description: Current healthcare expenditure per capita is adjusted for differences in living costs between countries but not for inflation. GDP per capita is adjusted for inflation and differences in living costs between countries.

details.title: GDP per capita
details.description: Average economic output per person in a country or region per year. This data is adjusted for inflation and differences in living costs between countries.

details.title: Domestic general government health expenditure (% of GDP)
details.description: Domestic general government expenditure on health from domestic sources, expressed as a share of GDP.

details.title: Expenditure on HIV prevention and treatment
details.description: Total in-country spending on HIV programs and services.

details.title: GDP per capita
details.description: Average economic output per person in a country or region per year. This data is adjusted for inflation and differences in living costs between countries.

details.title: Electoral democracy index
details.description: Central estimate of the extent to which political leaders are elected under comprehensive suffrage in free and fair elections, and freedoms of association and expression are guaranteed.

details.title: Taxes Income
details.description: Taxes on incomes, profits and capital gains, as share of GDP

details.title: Fossil-fuel subsidies
details.description: Fossil-fuel pre-tax subsidies measured in millions of nominal US dollars. This data is not adjusted for inflation or differences of cost between countries.

details.title: Government expenditure per primary student
details.description: GDP per capita data is adjusted for inflation and for differences in living costs between countries.

details.title: Public spending on education as a share of GDP
details.description: Total annual [general government](#dod:general-government) spending on all levels of education, expressed as a percentage of [GDP](#dod:gdp).

details.title: Net official development assistance and official aid received
details.description: Net official development assistance, expressed in US dollars and adjusted for inflation.

details.title: Foreign aid received as a share of national income
details.description: Official development assistance (ODA) divided by gross national income, expressed as a percentage. Monetary aid is estimated as net disbursements.

details.title: Foreign aid received
details.description: Official development assistance (ODA) is defined as government aid designed to promote the economic development and welfare of developing countries. Monetary aid is estimated as net disbursements. This data is expressed in US dollars. It is adjusted for inflation.

details.title: Homicide rate
details.description: Homicide rate is measured as the number of intentional homicide deaths per 100,000 people. GDP per capita is adjusted for inflation and for differences in living costs between countries.

details.title: Literacy rate
details.description: Share of adults who can read and write a simple statement about their everyday life.

details.title: Female share of graduates from Science, Technology, Engineering and Mathematics (STEM) programmes, tertiary (%)
details.description: Proportion of female graduates in STEM (Science, Technology, Engineering, and Mathematics) fields at the [tertiary](#dod:tertiary-education) level of education.

details.title: Share of students achieving minimum reading proficiency by the end of lower secondary education
details.description: Percentage of students at [lower secondary](#dod:lower-secondary-education) school age meeting minimum reading proficiency by the end of [lower secondary](#dod:lower-secondary-education) education. This data omits children who don't attend school.

details.title: Share of students at the end of lower-secondary education with minimum math proficiency
details.description: Proportion of children and young people achieving a minimum proficiency level in reading and mathematics (%)

details.title: Share of students achieving minimum reading proficiency by the end of primary education
details.description: Percentage of students at [primary](#dod:primary-education) school age meeting minimum reading proficiency by the end of [primary](#dod:primary-education) education. This data omits children who don't attend school.

details.title: Share of students at the end of primary education with minimum math proficiency
details.description: Proportion of children and young people achieving a minimum proficiency level in reading and mathematics (%)

details.title: Deaths from terrorism
details.description: Confirmed deaths, including all victims and attackers who died as a result of the incident.

details.title: Share of electricity generated by renewables
details.description: Measured as a percentage of total electricity produced in the country or region.

details.title: Electricity generation from coal
details.description: Measured in terawatt-hours.

details.title: Electricity generation from gas
details.description: Measured in terawatt-hours.

details.title: Electricity generation from nuclear
details.description: Measured in terawatt-hours.

details.title: Electricity generation from hydropower
details.description: Measured in terawatt-hours.

details.title: Electricity generation from solar power
details.description: Measured in terawatt-hours.

details.title: Electricity generation from oil
details.description: Measured in terawatt-hours.

details.title: Electricity generation from wind power
details.description: Measured in terawatt-hours.

details.title: Electricity generation from bioenergy
details.description: Measured in terawatt-hours.

details.title: Electricity generation from other renewables, excluding bioenergy
details.description: Measured in terawatt-hours.

details.title: Share of electricity generated by wind power
details.description: Measured as a percentage of total electricity produced in the country or region.

details.title: Share of electricity generated by solar power
details.description: Measured as a percentage of total electricity produced in the country or region.

details.title: Total wind capacity
details.description: Total wind (on- and off-grid) electricity installed capacity, measured in gigawatts. This includes onshore and offshore wind.

details.title: Electricity generation from wind power
details.description: Measured in terawatt-hours.

details.title: Wind power consumption per capita
details.description: Measured in kilowatt-hours per person.

details.title: Total solar capacity
details.description: Total solar (on- and off-grid) electricity installed capacity, measured in gigawatts. This includes solar photovoltaic and concentrated solar power.

details.title: Annual change in solar power consumption
details.description: Input-equivalent energy, in terawatt-hours, is based on gross generation and does not account for cross-border electricity supply.

details.title: Annual change in wind power consumption
details.description: Input-equivalent energy, in terawatt-hours, is based on gross generation and does not account for cross-border electricity supply.

details.title: Electricity generation from solar and wind power
details.description: Measured in terawatt-hours.

details.title: Coal consumption
details.description: Coal consumption by country or region, measured in terawatt-hours (TWh).

details.title: Annual change in coal consumption
details.description: Change in coal energy consumption relative to the previous year, measured in terawatt-hours.

details.title: Other renewables (including geothermal and biomass)
details.description: Figures are based on gross generation and do not account for cross-border electricity supply.

details.title: Electricity generation from solar power
details.description: Figures are based on gross generation and do not account for cross-border electricity supply.

details.title: Electricity generation from wind power
details.description: Figures are based on gross generation and do not account for cross-border electricity supply.

details.title: Electricity generation from hydropower
details.description: Figures are based on gross primary hydroelectric generation and do not account for cross-border electricity supply.

details.title: Primary energy consumption from renewables
details.description: Measured in terawatt-hours, using the substitution method.

details.title: Share of final energy use that comes from renewable sources
details.description: Renewable energy includes solar, wind, geothermal, hydropower, bioenergy, and marine sources.

details.title: Total electricity generation
details.description: Total electricity generated in each country or region, measured in terawatt-hours.

details.title: Electricity generation from renewables per person
details.description: Measured in kilowatt-hours per person.

details.title: Renewable electricity-generating capacity per person
details.description: The installed capacity of power plants that generate electricity from renewable energy sources. This includes hydropower, marine (ocean, tidal and wave), wind, solar (photovoltaic and thermal energy), bioenergy, and geothermal energy.

details.title: Share of electricity generated by coal
details.description: Measured as a percentage of total electricity produced in the country or region.

details.title: Electricity generation from coal
details.description: Measured in terawatt-hours.

details.title: Coal production
details.description: Measured in terawatt-hours.

details.title: Oil consumption
details.description: Measured in terawatt-hours.

details.title: Fossil fuel production
details.description: Fossil fuel production is given in terawatt-hours (TWh).

details.title: Oil production
details.description: Measured in terawatt-hours.

details.title: Gas production
details.description: Measured in terawatt-hours.

details.title: Share of the population with access to electricity
details.description: Having access to electricity is defined in international statistics as having an electricity source that can provide very basic lighting, and charge a phone or power a radio for 4 hours per day.

details.title: Number of people without access to electricity
details.description: Access to electricity means having an electricity source that can provide very basic lighting, and charge a phone or power a radio for 4 hours per day.

details.title: Share of electricity generated by fossil fuels
details.description: Electricity generation from coal, oil, and gas, measured as a percentage of total electricity produced in the country or region.

details.title: Carbon intensity of electricity generation
details.description: Greenhouse gases emitted per unit of generated electricity, measured in grams of CO₂ equivalents per kilowatt-hour.
details.unit: grams of CO₂ equivalents per kilowatt-hour

details.title: Explicit fossil fuel subsidies as a share of GDP
details.description: Subsidies are pre-tax and for both the production and consumption of fossil fuels. Production subsidies reduce the cost of producing coal, oil or gas. Consumption subsidies cut fuel prices for the end user, such as by fixing the price at the petrol pump so that it is less than the market rate.

details.title: Fossil-fuel subsidies per capita
details.description: Subsidies are pre-tax and for both the production and consumption of fossil fuels. Production subsidies reduce the cost of producing coal, oil or gas. Consumption subsidies cut fuel prices for the final consumer, for example by fixing the price at the gas pump so that it is cheaper than the market rate. The data is expressed in US dollars, adjusted for inflation.

details.title: Electricity, gas, steam and air conditioning supply
details.description: Total waste generation, by activity (Tonnes)

details.title: Primary energy consumption
details.description: Comprises commercially-traded fuels, including modern renewables used to generate electricity. Energy from all sources of non-fossil power generation is accounted for on an input-equivalent basis.

details.title: Oil production
details.description: Change captured by a range of socioeconomic and environmental indicators, measured relative to the first year.

details.title: Civil liberties score
details.description: The variable identifies the fine-grained extent of freedom of expression and association, the rule of law, and personal autonomy. Higher scores indicate more liberties.

details.title: Total democracy score
details.description: Freedom House's total democracy score is a 0-to-100 aggregate that adds up a country's points on 25 indicators of political rights (max 40) and civil liberties (max 60), creating a single snapshot of the freedoms people actually enjoy.

details.title: Freedom of expression
details.description: Indicates the extent to which individuals, groups, and the press can express their views free from government interference.

details.title: Political rights score
details.description: Identifies the fine-grained extent of free and fair elections, political pluralism and participation, and a functioning government. Higher scores indicate more rights.

details.title: Liberal democracy index
details.description: Central estimate of the extent of suffrage, the freedom and fairness of elections, freedoms of association and expression, individual and minority rights, equality before the law, and executive constraints.

details.title: Government
details.description: % of respondents replying that they "trust completely" or "trust somewhat" when asked "I am going to name a number of organisations. For each one, could you tell me how much confidence you have in them: is it a great deal of confidence, quite a lot of confidence, not very much confidence or none at all?" in the organization "Government".

details.title: Multidimensional Poverty Index (MPI)
details.description: Multidimensional poverty is defined as being deprived in a range of health, education and living standards indicators. The Multidimensional Poverty Index (MPI) is a measure that combines the prevalence and the intensity of multidimensional poverty on a scale from 0 to 1. Higher values indicate higher poverty.

details.title: Share of population living in multidimensional poverty
details.description: Multidimensional poverty is defined as being deprived in a range of health, education and living standards indicators. This is the share of the population that is multidimensionally poor.

details.title: Burden of disease
details.description: Disability-Adjusted Life Years (DALYs) per 100,000 individuals from all causes. DALYs measure the total burden of disease – both from years of life lost due to premature death and years lived with a disability. One DALY equals one lost year of healthy life.

details.title: Total disease burden
details.description: The total disease burden is measured as the number of Disability-Adjusted Life Years (DALYs) per year. DALYs measure the total burden of disease – both from years of life lost due to premature death and years lived with a disability. One DALY equals one lost year of healthy life.

details.title: Other diseases and conditions
details.description: Based on the underlying cause listed on death certificates.

details.title: Infectious diseases
details.description: Based on the underlying cause listed on death certificates.

details.title: Respiratory diseases
details.description: Based on the underlying cause listed on death certificates.

details.title: Neurological and mental health
details.description: Based on the underlying cause listed on death certificates.

details.title: Digestive and oral health
details.description: Based on the underlying cause listed on death certificates.

details.title: Cardiovascular diseases
details.description: Based on the underlying cause listed on death certificates.

details.title: Total deaths from cardiovascular diseases among both sexes
details.description: Estimated number of deaths from cardiovascular diseases in both sexes.

details.title: Number of new HIV infections
details.description: Number of people who acquired HIV during the reporting period

details.title: Reported cases of paralytic polio
details.description: Annual reported cases of polio that led to paralysis of the infected person. It includes both wild- and vaccine-derived polioviruses.

details.title: Reported paralytic polio cases per million
details.description: Annual number of reported cases of paralytic polio per million people. This includes all reported cases from wild polioviruses and vaccine-derived polioviruses.

details.title: Estimated polio cases
details.description: The total estimated number of polio cases.

details.title: Vaccine-derived poliovirus cases
details.description: The number of cases of circulating vaccine-derived poliovirus detected in a given year.

details.title: Total polio cases
details.description: The sum of wild poliovirus cases and circulating vaccine derived poliovirus cases.

details.title: Wild poliovirus cases
details.description: The number of cases of wild poliovirus detected in a given year

details.title: Reported cases of paralytic polio from vaccine-derived viruses
details.description: Some cases of paralytic polio arise from vaccine-derived poliovirus strains that have reverted into a form that can cause disease. The total number of cases across all three vaccine-derived strains is shown.

details.title: Number of one-year-olds who are not vaccinated against polio
details.description: Number of one-year-olds who haven't received the third dose of polio-containing vaccine. This may be either the oral or the inactivated polio vaccine (Pol3).

details.title: Number of one-year-olds who have had three doses of the diphtheria, tetanus and pertussis vaccine
details.description: Number of one-year-olds who had three doses of the combined diphtheria, tetanus and [pertussis](#dod:pertussis) vaccine in a given year.

details.title: Number of one-year-olds who have had three doses of the polio vaccine
details.description: Number of one-year-olds who had the third dose of either the oral or inactivated polio vaccine in a given year.

details.title: Number of one-year-olds who have had one dose of the measles vaccine
details.description: Number of one-year-olds who had the first dose of the measles vaccine in a given year.

details.title: Number of one-year-olds vaccinated against Haemophilus influenzae type b
details.description: Number of one-year-olds who had three doses of Haemophilus influenzae type b vaccine in a given year.

details.title: Number of one-year-olds vaccinated against rubella
details.description: Number of one-year-olds who had one dose of rubella vaccine in a given year.

details.title: Number of one-year-olds vaccinated against rotavirus
details.description: Number of one-year-olds who had the final recommended dose (2nd or 3rd) of the rotavirus vaccine in a given year.

details.title: Number of one-year-olds who have had three doses of the hepatitis B vaccine
details.description: Number of one-year-olds who had three doses of the hepatitis B vaccine in a given year.

details.title: Number of one-year-olds who have had the one dose of the inactivated polio vaccine
details.description: Number of one-year-olds who had the first dose of the inactivated polio vaccine in a given year.

details.title: Share of out-of-pocket spending on healthcare
details.description: Out-of-pocket spending on healthcare as percent of total current healthcare expenditure.

details.title: Homicides
details.description: Estimated number of deaths from interpersonal violence in both sexes.

details.title: Homicides by firearm
details.description: Number of intentional homicides where the weapon was a firearm.

details.title: Terrorism deaths
details.description: Confirmed deaths, including all victims and attackers who died because of a terrorist attack.

details.title: Cocoa bean production
details.description: Cocoa bean production is measured in tonnes.

details.title: Milk production
details.description: Milk represents the raw equivalents of all dairy products including cheese, yoghurt, cream and milk consumed as the final product.

details.title: Drug use disorder deaths (Opioids)
details.description: Estimated number of deaths from opioid use disorders in both sexes.

details.title: Drug use disorder deaths (Other drugs)
details.description: Estimated number of deaths from other drug use disorders in both sexes.

details.title: Drug use disorder deaths (Amphetamine)
details.description: Estimated number of deaths from amphetamine use disorders in both sexes.

details.title: Drug use disorder deaths (Cocaine)
details.description: Estimated number of deaths from cocaine use disorders in both sexes.

details.title: Tuberculosis deaths
details.description: Estimated deaths from all forms of tuberculosis.

details.title: Reported cholera cases
details.description: The number of reported cases of cholera. Testing and reporting of cholera is limited in many countries.

details.title: Reported cholera deaths
details.description: The number of reported deaths from cholera. Testing and reporting is limited in many countries.

details.title: Share of people who think homosexuality is never or rarely justified
details.description: % of respondents replying 1 to 4 in a scale from 1 to 10 when asked "Please tell me for each of the following statements whether you think it can always be justified, never be justified, or something in between, using this card", when the statement was "Homosexuality". In the scale, 1 means "never justifiable" and 10 means "always justifiable".

details.title: Share of people saying they do not want homosexual neighbors
details.description: % of respondents mentioning the group when asked "On this list are various groups of people. Could you please mention any that you would not like to have as neighbors?", when the group was "Homosexuals".

details.title: Transgender people are allowed to openly serve in the military
details.description: Measures if transgender people are allowed to serve in the military.

details.title: Number of terrorist attacks
details.description: Number of terrorist attacks. The GTD defines a terrorist attack as the threatened or actual use of illegal force and violence by a non-state actor to attain a political, economic, religious, or social goal through fear, coercion, or intimidation.

details.title: More than 100 deaths
details.description: terrorist attacks by the number of confirmed deaths, including both victims and perpetrators.

details.title: 51-99 deaths
details.description: terrorist attacks by the number of confirmed deaths, including both victims and perpetrators.

details.title: 21-50 deaths
details.description: terrorist attacks by the number of confirmed deaths, including both victims and perpetrators.

details.title: 11-20 deaths
details.description: terrorist attacks by the number of confirmed deaths, including both victims and perpetrators.

details.title: 6-10 deaths
details.description: terrorist attacks by the number of confirmed deaths, including both victims and perpetrators.

details.title: 1-5 deaths
details.description: terrorist attacks by the number of confirmed deaths, including both victims and perpetrators.

details.title: 0 deaths
details.description: terrorist attacks by the number of confirmed deaths, including both victims and perpetrators.

details.title: Attacks
details.description: Confirmed deaths and injuries include all victims and attackers who died or were hurt because of a terrorist attack.

details.title: Non-fatal injuries
details.description: Confirmed deaths and injuries include all victims and attackers who died or were hurt because of a terrorist attack.

details.title: Deaths
details.description: Confirmed deaths and injuries include all victims and attackers who died or were hurt because of a terrorist attack.

details.title: Fatalities
details.description: Confirmed deaths, including all victims and attackers who died because of a terrorist attack.

details.title: States involved in wars
details.description: State was a major participant in at least one conventional war that year.

details.title: States involved in state-based conflicts
details.description: State was a primary participant in at least one interstate, intrastate, or extrasystemic conflict that year.

details.title: States involved in interstate conflicts
details.description: State participated in at least one conflict with another state where force was threatened, displayed, or used that year.

details.title: War took place
details.description: At least one interstate, intrastate, or extrasystemic war event took place in this country in a given year.

details.title: High estimate
details.description: The high estimate of the number of deaths of combatants and civilians due to fighting in interstate, intrastate, extrasystemic, non-state conflicts, and one-sided violence that were ongoing that year.

details.title: Best estimate
details.description: The best estimate of the number of deaths of combatants and civilians due to fighting in interstate, intrastate, extrasystemic, non-state conflicts, and one-sided violence that were ongoing that year.

details.title: Low estimate
details.description: The low estimate of the number of deaths of combatants and civilians due to fighting in interstate, intrastate, extrasystemic, non-state conflicts, and one-sided violence that were ongoing that year.

details.title: Deaths from terrorism, by target (Abortion related)
details.description: Confirmed deaths, including all victims and attackers who died as a result of the incident. Attacks on abortion clinics, employees, patrons, or security personnel stationed at clinics.

details.title: Deaths from terrorism, by target (Business)
details.description: Confirmed deaths, including all victims and attackers who died as a result of the incident. Businesses are defined as individuals or organizations engaged in commercial or mercantile activity as a means of livelihood. Any attack on a business or private citizens patronizing a business such as a restaurant, gas station, music store, bar, café, etc. This includes attacks carried out against corporate offices or employees of firms like mining companies, or oil corporations. Furthermore, includes attacks conducted on business people or corporate officers. Included in this value as well are hospitals and chambers of commerce and cooperatives. Does not include attacks carried out in public or quasi-public areas such as “business district or commercial area”, or generic business-related individuals such as “businessmen” (these attack are captured under “Private Citizens and Property”). Also does not include attacks against generic business-related individuals such as “businessmen.” Unless the victims were targeted because of their specific business affiliation, these attacks belong in “Private Citizens and Property.”

details.title: Deaths from terrorism, by target (Maritime)
details.description: Confirmed deaths, including all victims and attackers who died as a result of the incident. Includes civilian maritime: attacks against fishing ships, oil tankers, ferries, yachts, etc. (Attacks on fishermen are coded as “Private Citizens and Property,”).

details.title: Deaths from terrorism, by target (NGO)
details.description: Confirmed deaths, including all victims and attackers who died as a result of the incident. Includes attacks on offices and employees of non-governmental organizations (NGOs). NGOs here include large multinational non-governmental organizations such as the Red Cross and Doctors without Borders, as well as domestic organizations. Does not include labor unions, social clubs, student groups, and other non-NGO (such cases are coded as “Private Citizens and Property”).

details.title: Deaths from terrorism, by target (Religious targets)
details.description: Confirmed deaths, including all victims and attackers who died as a result of the incident. This value includes attacks on religious leaders, (Imams, priests, bishops, etc.), religious institutions (mosques, churches), religious places or objects (shrines, relics, etc.). This value alsoincludes attacks on organizations that are affiliated with religious entities that are not NGOs, businesses or schools. Attacks on religious pilgrims are considered “Private Citizens and Property;” attacks on missionaries are considered religious figures.

details.title: Deaths from terrorism, by target (Militia)
details.description: Confirmed deaths, including all victims and attackers who died as a result of the incident.

details.title: Deaths from terrorism, by target (Utilities)
details.description: Confirmed deaths, including all victims and attackers who died as a result of the incident.

details.title: Deaths from terrorism, by target (Violent political parties)
details.description: Confirmed deaths, including all victims and attackers who died as a result of the incident.

details.title: Deaths from terrorism, by target (Tourists)
details.description: Confirmed deaths, including all victims and attackers who died as a result of the incident. This value includes the targeting of tour buses, tourists, or “tours.” Tourists are persons who travel primarily for the purposes of leisure or amusement. Government tourist offices are included in this value. The attack must clearly target tourists, not just an assault on a business or transportation system used by tourists. Travel agencies are coded as business targets.

details.title: Deaths from terrorism, by target (Telecommunication)
details.description: Confirmed deaths, including all victims and attackers who died as a result of the incident. This includes attacks on facilities and infrastructure for the transmission of information. More specifically this value includes things like cell phone towers, telephone booths, television transmitters, radio, and microwave towers.

details.title: Deaths from terrorism, by target (Police)
details.description: Confirmed deaths, including all victims and attackers who died as a result of the incident. This value includes attacks on members of the police force or police installations; this includes police boxes, patrols headquarters, academies, cars, checkpoints, etc. Includes attacks against jails or prison facilities, or jail or prison staff or guards.

details.title: Deaths from terrorism, by target (Military)
details.description: Confirmed deaths, including all victims and attackers who died as a result of the incident.

details.title: Deaths from terrorism, by target (Private citizens & property)
details.description: Confirmed deaths, including all victims and attackers who died as a result of the incident. This value includes attacks on individuals, the public in general or attacks in public areas including markets, commercial streets, busy intersections and pedestrian malls. Also includes ambiguous cases where the target/victim was a named individual, or where the target/victim of an attack could be identified by name, age, occupation, gender or nationality. This value also includes ceremonial events, such as weddings and funerals. The GTD contains a number of attacks against students. If these attacks are not expressly against a school, university or other educational institution or are not carried out in an educational setting, these attacks are coded using this value. Also, includes incidents involving political supporters as private citizens and property, provided that these supporters are not part of a government-sponsored event. Finally, this value includes police informers. Does not include attacks causing civilian casualties in businesses such as restaurants, cafes or movie theaters (these categories are coded as “Business”)

details.title: Fatalties
details.description: Confirmed deaths, including all victims and attackers who died because of a terrorist attack.

details.title: Attacks
details.description: Number of terrorist attacks by world region.

details.title: Total deaths from drowning among both sexes
details.description: Estimated number of deaths from drowning in both sexes.

details.title: Deaths from road injuries
details.description: Annual number of deaths from road injuries. Road injuries include deaths of drivers, passengers, pedestrians and cyclists.

details.title: Total deaths from falls among both sexes
details.description: Estimated number of deaths from falls in both sexes.

details.title: Total deaths from fire, heat and hot substances among both sexes
details.description: Estimated number of deaths from fire, heat and hot substances in both sexes.

details.title: Total deaths from poisonings among both sexes
details.description: Estimated number of deaths from poisonings in both sexes.

details.title: Total deaths from drug use disorders among both sexes
details.description: Estimated number of deaths from drug use disorders in both sexes.

details.title: Total deaths from malignant neoplasms among both sexes
details.description: Estimated number of deaths from malignant neoplasms in both sexes.

details.description: Emissions are measured in tonnes of carbon dioxide-equivalents.

details.title: Greenhouse gas emissions by sector (Land-use change and forestry)
details.description: Emissions are measured in tonnes of carbon dioxide-equivalents.

details.description: Emissions are measured in tonnes of carbon dioxide-equivalents.

details.description: Emissions are measured in tonnes of carbon dioxide-equivalents.

details.description: Emissions are measured in tonnes of carbon dioxide-equivalents.

details.title: Greenhouse gas emissions by sector (Manufacturing and construction)
details.description: Emissions are measured in tonnes of carbon dioxide-equivalents.

details.title: Greenhouse gas emissions by sector (Transport)
details.description: Emissions are measured in tonnes of carbon dioxide-equivalents.

details.title: Greenhouse gas emissions by sector (Electricity and heat)
details.description: Emissions are measured in tonnes of carbon dioxide-equivalents.

details.title: Greenhouse gas emissions by sector (Fugitive emissions)
details.description: Emissions are measured in tonnes of carbon dioxide-equivalents.

details.description: Emissions are measured in tonnes of carbon dioxide-equivalents.

details.title: Greenhouse gas emissions by sector (Aviation and shipping)
details.description: Emissions are measured in tonnes of carbon dioxide-equivalents.

details.title: Annual greenhouse gas emissions including land use
details.description: Greenhouse gas emissions are measured in tonnes of carbon dioxide-equivalents over a 100-year timescale.

details.title: Annual greenhouse gas emissions including land use
details.description: Greenhouse gas emissions include carbon dioxide, methane and nitrous oxide from all sources, including land-use change. They are measured in tonnes of carbon dioxide-equivalents over a 100-year timescale.

details.title: Total greenhouse gas emissions, excluding land use and forestry
details.description: Greenhouse gas emissions are measured in tonnes of carbon dioxide-equivalents per person. Contributions from land-use change and forestry are not included.

details.title: CO₂ emissions by fuel or industry type (Flaring)
details.description: Annual emissions of carbon dioxide (CO₂) from flaring, measured in tonnes.

details.title: CO₂ emissions by fuel or industry type (Cement)
details.description: Annual emissions of carbon dioxide (CO₂) from cement, measured in tonnes.

details.title: CO₂ emissions by fuel or industry type (Gas)
details.description: Annual emissions of carbon dioxide (CO₂) from gas, measured in tonnes.

details.title: CO₂ emissions by fuel or industry type (Oil)
details.description: Annual emissions of carbon dioxide (CO₂) from oil, measured in tonnes.

details.title: CO₂ emissions by fuel or industry type (Coal)
details.description: Annual emissions of carbon dioxide (CO₂) from coal, measured in tonnes.

details.title: CO₂ emissions from fossil fuels and industry
details.description: Annual total emissions of carbon dioxide (CO₂), excluding land-use change, measured in tonnes.

details.title: CO₂ emissions from land-use change
details.description: Annual emissions of carbon dioxide (CO₂) from land-use change, measured in tonnes.

details.title: Total CO₂ emissions (from fossil fuels and land-use change)
details.description: Annual total emissions of carbon dioxide (CO₂), including land-use change, measured in tonnes.

details.title: CO₂ emissions from land-use change
details.description: Annual emissions of carbon dioxide (CO₂) from land-use change, measured in tonnes.

details.title: CO₂ emissions from fossil fuels
details.description: Annual total emissions of carbon dioxide (CO₂), excluding land-use change, measured in tonnes.

details.title: Share of global CO₂ emissions from land-use change
details.description: Annual emissions of carbon dioxide (CO₂) from land-use change, measured as a percentage of global emissions of CO₂ from land-use change in the same year.

details.title: Share of global CO₂ emissions including land-use change
details.description: Annual total emissions of carbon dioxide (CO₂), including land-use change, measured as a percentage of global total emissions of CO₂ in the same year.

details.title: Share of global annual CO₂ emissions
details.description: Annual total emissions of carbon dioxide (CO₂), excluding land-use change, measured as a percentage of global emissions of CO₂ in the same year.

details.title: Annual carbon dioxide emissions
details.description: Carbon dioxide released by [wildfires](#dod:wildfires) in tonnes. The 2025 data is incomplete and was last updated 11 September 2025.

details.title: Annual CO₂ emissions per unit energy (kg per kilowatt-hour)
details.description: Annual total emissions of carbon dioxide (CO₂), excluding land-use change, measured in kilograms per kilowatt-hour of primary energy consumption.

details.title: Annual CO₂ emissions from coal
details.description: Annual emissions of carbon dioxide (CO₂) from coal, measured in tonnes.

details.title: Annual CO₂ emissions from gas
details.description: Annual emissions of carbon dioxide (CO₂) from gas, measured in tonnes.

details.description: Annual total emissions of carbon dioxide (CO₂), excluding land-use change, measured in tonnes.

details.title: Consumption-based emissions
details.description: Annual consumption-based emissions of carbon dioxide (CO₂), measured in tonnes.

details.title: Annual consumption-based CO₂ emissions
details.description: Annual consumption-based emissions of carbon dioxide (CO₂), measured in tonnes.

details.title: Annual CO₂ emissions embedded in trade

details.title: Annual CO₂ emissions embedded in trade (per capita)
